stemHtml: Wing-tip vortices are formed by the...

options.a: spanwise flow of higher pressure air from beneath the wing outward and upward into the lower pressure air above the wing.
options.b: rotational velocity imparted to the free stream air resulting from the propeller wash across the top of the wing.
options.c: aerodynamic interference of boundary layers from different parts of the aeroplane with those of the wing.
options.d: mixing of the high energy airflow over the wing with the free stream air behind the trailing edge of the wing.
